name: Wrestlers
description: + `symbol:diceb` if you sacrifice one warband in your force.

name: Battle Honors
description: If you're victorious, gain `symbol:favor` `symbol:favor` from the `symbol:suit-order` bank.

name: Bear Traps
description: - `symbol:dicer` Kill one warband on the attacker's board.

name: Longbows
description: ± `symbol:dicer`

name: Keep
description: +2 `symbol:diceb` if this site is targeted.

name: Pressgangs
description: You can muster on cards that have `symbol:favor` or `symbol:secret` on them.

name: Garrison
description: **When Played**, gain one warband per site you rule, and put one warband from your board on each site you rule.

name: Scouts
description: Gain 1 Supply.

name: Alchemist
description: **Action**: Gain `symbol:favor` `symbol:favor` `symbol:favor` `symbol:favor` from any favor bank or banks.

name: Martial Culture
description: If you're an Exile and defeat another Exile, you may become a Citizen- take no relic, end your Act Phase, and refresh supply to full _(leftmost)_.

name: Errand Boy
description: You may draw from a discard pile in a different region instead of yours.

name: Mercenaries
description: ±3 `symbol:dicer` If you're defeated while using this power, discard Mercenaries.

name: Tinker's Fair
description: **Action**: Negotiate a binding exchange of `symbol:favor`, `symbol:secret`, and relics with any player.

name: Rain Boots
description: Ignore all your enemy's rolls of single shields `symbol:shield`. At end, discard Rain Boots.

name: A Small Favor
description: **When Played**, Gain four warbands.

name: Second Wind
description: After you're victorious, you may travel and then may campaign, spending no Supply for either.

name: Sleight of Hand
description: **Action**: Take `symbol:secret` from a player whose pawn is at your site. You cannot take their last `symbol:secret`.

name: Key to the City
description: **When Played**, if the ruler's pawn is not at this site, kill any warbands at this site, then gain a warband and place it here.

name: Scryer
description: **Action**: Peek at any one discard pile.

name: Disgraced Captain
description: +4 `symbol:dicer` if targeting a site that has an `symbol:suit-order` card.

name: Naysayers
description: **Rest**: If any Exile is the Oathkeeper or Usurper, take `symbol:favor` from the Chancellor.

name: Book Burning
description: If you're victorious and targeted the defender's pawn, they also burn all of the `symbol:secret` on their board except their last.

name: Ancient Binding
description: **Action**: Each player burns all their `symbol:secret` except their last. _(The only `symbol:secret` you keep is the one here.)_

name: Horse Archers
description: ±3 `symbol:dicer` At end, discard Horse Archers.

name: Warning Signals
description: Move any warbands to and from your board and any sites you rule _(except the last warband from a site)_. At end, discard Warning Signals.

name: Elders
description: **Action**: Gain `symbol:favor`.

name: The Gathering
description: **When Played**, any players in turn order may put their pawn on this site. Then, players with pawns here may negotiate binding exchanges of `symbol:favor`, `symbol:secret`, relics, and advisers.

name: Faithful Friend
description: **When Played**, gain 4 Supply.

name: Tents
description: Spend no Supply if you're traveling to a site in your region.

name: Great Herd
description: **When Played**, you may swap Great Herd with a `symbol:suit-nomad` card at any site.

name: Fire Talkers
description: ±3 `symbol:dicer` if you hold the Darkest Secret.

name: Magician's Code
description: If recovering the Darkest Secret, gain `symbol:secret` `symbol:secret` and add them to any other `symbol:secret` you're paying to recover it _(even none)_.

name: Spirit Snare
description: **Action**: Take `symbol:favor` from any one favor bank.

name: Wizard School
description: **Action**: Gain `symbol:secret`, then end your Act Phase.

name: Dazzle
description: **When Played**, discard all `symbol:suit-hearth` and `symbol:suit-order` cards at sites in your region.

name: Acting Troupe
description: Act as if the Acting Troupe is a `symbol:suit-beast` or `symbol:suit-order` card instead.

name: Taming Charm
description: **Action**: Discard a `symbol:suit-beast` or `symbol:suit-nomad` card at your site to gain `symbol:favor` `symbol:favor` from the matching favor bank.

name: Inquisitor
description: **Action**: Peek at an adviser of a player whose pawn is at your site. If it is the Conspiracy, you play it or discard it. If it is not, give them the `symbol:favor` here.

name: Wolves
description: **Action**: Kill one warband _(even yours)_ on any one board.

name: Animal Playmates
description: Spend no Supply if you're mustering on a `symbol:suit-beast` card.

name: True Names
description: Your enemy **cannot** use battle plans that match any of your advisers against you.

name: The Old Oak
description: If trading with The Old Oak for `symbol:secret`, gain one more `symbol:secret` if you have any `symbol:suit-beast` advisers.

name: Forest Paths
description: Spend no Supply and ignore the powers of sites if you're traveling to a site with a `symbol:suit-beast` card.

name: Long-Lost Heir
description: **When Played**, if you're an Exile, you may become a Citizen- take no relic, end your Act Phase, and refresh Supply to full _(leftmost)_.

name: Rangers
description: Ignore all skulls `symbol:skull` you roll. +2 `symbol:dicer` if the defense pool has 4+ `symbol:diceb`.

name: Roving Terror
description: **Action**: Discard a denizen card at any other site and move this card there.

name: Wayside Inn
description: **Action**: Gain 2 Supply.

name: Extra Provisions
description: +2 `symbol:diceb`

name: Memory of Home
description: **Action**: Move all `symbol:favor` from any one favor bank to the `symbol:suit-hearth` bank.

name: Welcoming Party
description: If you play a denizen card that was not a facedown adviser, gain `symbol:favor` from the `symbol:suit-hearth` bank.

name: Traveling Doctor
description: If you're defeated, kill no warbands in your force and discard Traveling Doctor. **Ignore** powers that kill all of your force.

name: Storyteller
description: **Action**: Place `symbol:secret` from the shared bank on the Darkest Secret.

name: Armed Mob
description: **Action**: Discard a faceup adviser from a player who holds the Darkest Secret but not the People's Favor.

name: Tavern Songs
description: **Action**: Peek at the top three cards of your region's discard pile.

name: Secret Signal
description: If you gain only one `symbol:favor`, gain one more `symbol:favor`.

name: Augury
description: Draw one more card. _(Stop after a Vision as normal.)_

name: Rusting Ray
description: If you hold the Darkest Secret, **ignore** all your enemy's rolls of hollow swords `symbol:swordh`.

name: Portal
description: Spend no Supply and **ignore** the powers of sites if you're traveling to or from this site.

name: Billowing Fog
description: If you're defeated, kill no warbands in your force. **Ignore** powers that kill all of your force.

name: Kindred Warriors
description: Ignore all skulls `symbol:skull` you roll. ±X `symbol:dicer` up to the number of other suits you rule.

name: Terror Spells
description: **Action**: Kill any two warbands in your region _(at sites or on boards, even yours)_ if you hold the Darkest Secret.

name: Blood Pact
description: **Action**: Sacrifice an even number of warbands on your board. For every two you sacrifice, gain `symbol:secret`.

name: Revelation
description: **When Played**, each player, following turn order, may burn any number of `symbol:favor` to gain an equal number of `symbol:secret`.

name: Observatory
description: While your pawn is here, you may draw from any one discard pile.

name: Plague Engines
description: **Action**: Each player _(even you)_ places one `symbol:favor` per site they rule into the `symbol:suit-arcane` bank.

name: Gleaming Armor
description: Your enemy's battle plans have an added cost of `symbol:secret`.

name: Bewitch
description: **When Played**, if you're an Exile and have more `symbol:secret` _(even on cards)_ than the Chancellor, you may become a Citizen- take no relic, end your Act Phase, and refresh Supply to full.

name: Jinx
description: If you rule Jinx, after you roll `symbol:dicer` or `symbol:diceb` for any reason, you may use this power to reroll all those dice once. _(This is not a battle plan!)_

name: Tutor
description: **Action**: Gain `symbol:secret`

name: Dream Thief
description: **Action**: Swap any two facedown advisers.

name: Cracking Ground
description: ± `symbol:dicer` per site targeted.

name: Sealing Ward
description: Your relics add one more `symbol:diceb` when targeted.

name: Initiation Rite
description: To muster, you **must** place `symbol:secret` instead of `symbol:favor`.

name: Vow of Silence
description: You **cannot** recover the Darkest Secret or give anyone `symbol:secret`. Whenever a player recovers it, you gain X `symbol:secret` equal to the number of `symbol:secret` they placed.

name: Forgotten Vault
description: **Action**: Place `symbol:secret` from the shared bank on the Darkest Secret, or burn `symbol:secret` from the Darkest Secret _(not last `symbol:secret`)_.

name: Map Library
description: While your pawn is at this site, you may trade with a card at any site in your region.

name: Witch's Bargain
description: **Action**: Give `symbol:secret` to a player whose pawn is at your site to take `symbol:favor` `symbol:favor` from them, or give `symbol:favor` `symbol:favor` for `symbol:secret`, any number of times.

name: Master of Disguise
description: Act as if you had another player's advisers instead. _(You can't use your other advisers.)_

name: Charlatan
description: **When Played**, burn all `symbol:secret` but one from the Darkest Secret.

name: Assassin
description: You can only have two advisers. **Action**: Discard a faceup adviser of a player whose pawn is at your site.

name: Downtrodden
description: Gain two more warbands if mustering on a card whose favor bank has the least `symbol:favor` _(not tied)_.

name: Blackmail
description: **When Played**, choose a relic held by a player whose pawn is at your site. You take the relic unless they give you `symbol:favor` `symbol:favor` `symbol:favor`.

name: Cracked Sage
description: ±4 `symbol:dicer` if your enemy has an `symbol:suit-arcane` adviser.

name: Dissent
description: **When Played**, each player, except the holder of the People's Favor, places one `symbol:favor` on this card for each suit of card they rule.

name: False Prophet
description: **When Played**, if you're an Exile, gain one warband and put it on any revealed Vision. You now also have it revealed. If it is ever discarded, kill the warband and play or discard the Vision as if you had searched.

name: Vow of Renewal
description: You **cannot** recover the People's Favor. Whenever any player burns `symbol:favor`, you take the `symbol:favor` instead.

name: Zealots
description: If the defending force is larger than your force, each warband you sacrifice will add three _(not one)_ to your attack.

name: Royal Ambitions
description: **When Played**, if you're an Exile and rule more sites than the Chancellor, you may become a Citizen- take any one Reliquary relic without peeking, end your Act Phase, and refresh Supply to full.

name: Salt the Earth
description: You **cannot** play Salt the Earth to a site with any locked cards. **When Played**, ignore this site's capacity. Discard all other denizens at this site. This site's capacity is now 1.

name: Beast Tamer
description: Enemies cannot use `symbol:suit-beast` or `symbol:suit-nomad` battle plans against you.

name: Riots
description: **When Played**, if the People's Favor is on the Mob side, discard all other cards of the most common suit on the map. If there is a tie, you choose among the tied suits.

name: Silver Tongue
description: You can only have two advisers. **Rest**: Take `symbol:favor` from a favor bank matching a card at your site.

name: Gambling Hall
description: **Action**: Roll 4 `symbol:diceb` and take X `symbol:favor` equal to the total `symbol:shield` result from any one favor bank.

name: Boiling Lake
description: If you travel to this site and do not rule this card, you **must** kill two warbands on your board if able.

name: Relic Thief
description: After a player takes any relics and their pawn is in your region, you may use this power to roll one `symbol:diceb` per relic taken. If you roll no `symbol:shield` / `symbol:shield` `symbol:shield`, take the relics.

name: Enchantress
description: **Action**: Swap this card with any faceup adviser.

name: Insomnia
description: You can only have two advisers. **Rest**: Gain `symbol:secret`.

name: Sneak Attack
description: After another player's campaign, you may campaign, spending no Supply, if you declare them as the defender.

name: Gossip
description: Enemies of Gossip's ruler **cannot** play cards as facedown advisers.

name: Bandit Chief
description: **When Played**, kill one warband at each site. While Bandit Chief is faceup, each site has two more bandits.

name: Chaos Cult
description: After another player takes the Oathkeeper title, you take `symbol:favor` from them.

name: Slander
description: If you're victorious and targeted the defender's pawn, they burn all of the `symbol:favor` on their board _(not half)_.

name: Code of Honor
description: ±2 `symbol:dicer` but you **cannot** use other battle plans.

name: Outriders
description: Ignore all skulls `symbol:skull` you roll.

name: Messenger
description: **Action**: Move any warbands to and from your board and any sites you rule _(except the last warband from a site)_.

name: Field Promotion
description: If you're victorious, gain three warbands.

name: Palanquin
description: **Action**: Choose a player whose pawn is at your site. Put your pawn on a site that they can travel to. Make them travel to that site, spending no Supply.

name: Shield Wall
description: +2 `symbol:diceb` If you're defeated, **kill** all of your force.

name: Military Parade
description: If you're victorious, gain `symbol:favor` from the favor banks matching each adviser of your enemy _(including Imperial Allies)_.

name: Tome Guardians
description: Enemies of Tome Guardians' ruler **cannot** target or take the Darkest Secret in any way.

name: Tyrant
description: You **must** kill a warband _(even your own)_ at the site you travel to, if able.

name: Forced Labor
description: Enemies **cannot** search if their pawn is at any site ruled by Forced Labor's ruler unless they give `symbol:favor` to its ruler. _(Give it to Chancellor if Empire, burn it if bandits.)_

name: Secret Police
description: Enemies **cannot** play Visions faceup while their pawn is at any site ruled by Secret Police's ruler.

name: Specialist
description: The defender **cannot** use battle plans.

name: Captains
description: **Action**: Campaign at any site you rule. Act as if your pawn is there. Spend no Supply and add your warbands there to your force.

name: Siege Engines
description: **Action**: Kill two warbands _(even yours)_ at any one site in your region.

name: Royal Tax
description: **When Played**: take `symbol:favor` `symbol:favor` from each player whose pawn is at a site you rule in your pawn's region.

name: Toll Roads
description: Enemies **cannot** travel to sites ruled by Toll Roads' ruler unless they give `symbol:favor` to its ruler. _(Give it to Chancellor if Empire, burn it if bandits.)_

name: Curfew
description: Enemies **cannot** trade with cards ruled by Curfew's ruler unless they give `symbol:favor` to its ruler. _(Give it to Chancellor if Empire, burn it if bandits.)_

name: Knights Errant
description: After mustering, you may campaign, spending no Supply.

name: Vow of Obedience
description: You **cannot** play Visions faceup. **Rest**: Take `symbol:favor` from any one favor bank.

name: Hunting Party
description: After searching the world deck, you may campaign, spending no Supply.

name: Council Seat
description: If you're a Citizen, you **cannot** be exiled, even by yourself.

name: Encirclement
description: ±2 `symbol:dicer` if your force is larger than your enemy's.

name: Peace Envoy
description: You **cannot** use other battle plans. If your enemy's pawn is at your site, give them one `symbol:favor` per `symbol:diceb` in the pool. You're victorious now. **Ignore** killing warbands.

name: Relic Hunter
description: You may target facedown relics at targeted sites, adding 1 `symbol:diceb` per relic. You may put any relics you take on the bottom of the relic deck.

name: Homesteaders
description: **Action**: Move one of your faceup advisers to your site.

name: Crop Rotation
description: If playing to a site, you may discard a denizen there first.

name: A Round of Ale
description: **Action**: Return all `symbol:favor` and `symbol:secret`, and flip your `symbol:secret`, as in the Rest Phase, except for the `symbol:favor` here.

name: Land Warden
description: You may play two cards you draw _(instead of one)_ if you play at least one card to a site.

name: Charming Friend
description: **Action**: Take `symbol:favor` from a player whose pawn is at your site.

name: Village Constable
description: ±2 `symbol:dicer` unless your enemy has the People's Favor.

name: Family Heirloom
description: **When Played**, draw a relic. Take it or put it on the bottom of the relic deck.

name: News from Afar
description: Spend no Supply.

name: Levelers
description: **Action**: Move `symbol:favor` `symbol:favor` from the favor bank from the most `symbol:favor` to that with the least `symbol:favor`. You decide ties.

name: Fabled Feast
description: **When Played**, take X `symbol:favor` equal to the number of `symbol:suit-hearth` cards you rule _(including Fabled Feast)_ from any one favor bank.

name: The Great Levy
description: ±3 `symbol:dicer` and **ignore** all skulls `symbol:skull` you roll, unless your enemy has the People's Favor.

name: Hearts and Minds
description: As defender, you're victorious now. At end, discard Hearts and Minds unless you hold the People's Favor.

name: Relic Breaker
description: **Action**: Put a facedown relic at your site on the bottom of the relic deck to gain three warbands.

name: Book Binders
description: After another player plays a Vision faceup, you gain `symbol:favor` `symbol:favor` from any one favor bank.

name: Ballot Box
description: **Action**: If you're an Exile and have the People's Favor, become a Citizen- take no relic, end your Act Phase, and refresh Supply to full.

name: Saddle Makers
description: After another player plays a `symbol:suit-nomad` or `symbol:suit-order` card, you gain `symbol:favor` `symbol:favor` from the matching favor bank.

name: Herald
description: After another player campaigns against a player _(not bandits)_, you gain `symbol:favor` from any favor bank.

name: Rowdy Pub
description: Gain one more warband if mustering from Rowdy Pub.

name: Vow of Peace
description: You **cannot** campaign. Attackers **cannot** sacrifice warbands to increase their attack against you.

name: Deed Writer
description: **Action**: Negotiate a binding exchange of `symbol:favor`, `symbol:secret`, and ruled sites with any player. Old ruler moves warbands to board, and new ruler moves warbands from board.

name: Salad Days
description: **When Played**, gain `symbol:favor` `symbol:favor` `symbol:favor`- one each from three different favor banks.

name: Marriage
description: Marriage counts as two `symbol:suit-hearth` advisers, but only counts as one toward your adviser limit.

name: Hospital
description: If any of your warbands would be killed, place them on Hospital's site instead if you still rule it.

name: Awaited Return
description: Spend no Supply if you sacrifice one warband from your board.

name: Convoys
description: **Action**: Take another region's discard pile and put it on top of your region's discard pile _(even if empty)_.

name: Vow of Kinship
description: Move all of your `symbol:favor` to the `symbol:suit-nomad` bank. Any `symbol:favor` you gain or take is put in the `symbol:suit-nomad` bank. You can use `symbol:favor` in the `symbol:suit-nomad` bank as if it is on your board.

name: Wild Mounts
description: If you would discard any number of `symbol:suit-nomad` battle plans, you may instead discard any one `symbol:suit-beast` you rule.

name: Lancers
description: Double your total attack roll. At end, discard Lancers.

name: Mountain Giant
description: ±1 `symbol:dicer` or ±3. At end, discard.

name: Rival Khan
description: ±4 `symbol:dicer` if your enemy has a `symbol:suit-nomad` adviser. At end, discard Rival Khan.

name: Lost Tongue
description: Other players **cannot** target or take your relics or banners in any way unless they rule a `symbol:suit-nomad` card.

name: Special Envoy
description: Spend no Supply. After traveling, end your Act Phase.

name: Resettle
description: **Action**: Move a faceup `symbol:suit-nomad` card from any player's advisers to any site.

name: Oracle
description: **Action**: Draw the Vision closest to the top of the world deck. Play or discard it as if you searched.

name: Pilgrimage
description: **When Played**, move all denizens at your site to the Dispossessed. Shuffle and draw denizens from the Dispossessed equal to the number you moved. Peek at them and put them on your region's discard pile.

name: Spell Breaker
description: Enemies of Spell Breaker's ruler **cannot** use powers that cost any `symbol:secret` or `symbol:secretb`.

name: Mounted Patrol
description: The attacker rolls only half the `symbol:dicer` in their attack pool, rounded down. At end, discard Mounted Patrol.

name: Great Crusade
description: ± `symbol:dicer` per `symbol:suit-nomad` card you rule. At end, discard Great Crusade.

name: Ancient Bloodline
description: Your enemies act as if denizens and relics at sites you rule are **locked**.

name: Ancient Pact
description: **When Played**, you may give the Chancellor the Darkest Secret to become a Citizen- take any one Reliquary relic without peeking, end your Act Phase, and refresh Supply to full.

name: Storm Caller
description: +2 `symbol:diceb` At end, discard Storm Caller.

name: Family Wagon
description: You can only have one adviser that is not a `symbol:suit-nomad`. You can have any number of `symbol:suit-nomad` advisers- they **ignore** your adviser limit.

name: Way Station
description: Spend no Supply if you're traveling to this site and either rule Way Station or choose to give `symbol:favor` to its ruler. _(Give it to Chancellor if Empire, burn it if bandits.)_

name: Twin Brother
description: **When Played**, you may swap this card with a faceup `symbol:suit-nomad` adviser of another player.

name: Hospitality
description: After traveling, gain `symbol:favor` from one favor bank that matches both a card at your site and one of your advisers.

name: A Fast Steed
description: Spend no Supply if you have three or fewer warbands on your board.

name: Relic Worship
description: After you recover a relic, gain 3 Supply.

name: Sacred Ground
description: Players **cannot** play Visions, except the Conspiracy, faceup, unless their pawn is at this site.

name: Nature Worship
description: ± `symbol:dicer` per `symbol:suit-beast` adviser you have.

name: Birdsong
description: Spend no Supply if you're trading with a `symbol:suit-beast` or `symbol:suit-nomad` card.

name: Small Friends
description: Act as if your pawn is at any site with a `symbol:suit-beast` card. _(You may use Trade modifiers there.)_

name: Grasping Vines
description: Enemies traveling from any site ruled by Grasping Vines' ruler **must** kill one warband on their board if able.

name: Threatening Roar
description: **When Played**, discard all `symbol:suit-nomad` and `symbol:suit-beast` cards at sites in your region.

name: Fae Merchant
description: **Action**: Draw a relic and take it. Put any relic you hold except the Grand Scepter on the bottom of the relic deck.

name: Second Chance
description: **Action**: Kill one warband on the board of a player who has an `symbol:suit-order` or `symbol:suit-discord` adviser to gain one warband.

name: Pied Piper
description: This card ignores the adviser limit. **Action**: Move this card to any other player's advisers. Take `symbol:favor` `symbol:favor` from them.

name: Mushrooms
description: Spend no Supply, but draw only one card _(not three)_ from the bottom of your region's discard pile.

name: Insect Swarm
description: Your enemy's battle plans each have an added cost of `symbol:favorb`.

name: Vow of Union
description: In campaigns, warbands at sites you rule add to your attacking force. You **cannot** travel from a site you rule if any warbands are on your board.

name: Giant Python
description: Whenever a player attacks you, they **must** declare targets that add an even total _(2, 4, etc)_ of `symbol:diceb` to your defense pool.

name: War Tortoise
description: **Ignore** all attack or defense added by your enemy's rolls of `symbol:sword` `symbol:sword` `symbol:skull` or `symbol:shield` `symbol:shield`. _(Any `symbol:skull` they roll still kill their warbands.)_

name: New Growth
description: You may play `symbol:suit-beast` and `symbol:suit-hearth` cards to any site _(that has space)_.

name: Wild Cry
description: If you play a `symbol:suit-beast` card, gain 1 Supply and 2 warbands.

name: Animal Host
description: **When Played**, gain warbands equal to the total number of `symbol:suit-beast` cards _(including Animal Host)_ at any sites _(regardless of rule)_.

name: Memory of Nature
description: **Action**: Move a total of X `symbol:favor` from any favor banks to the `symbol:suit-beast` bank. X is the number of `symbol:suit-beast` cards on the map.

name: Marsh Spirit
description: Players who target this site **cannot** use battle plans.

name: Vow of Poverty
description: You **cannot** gain `symbol:favor` from Trade. **Rest**: If you have no `symbol:favor`, take `symbol:favor` `symbol:favor` from any one favor bank.

name: Forest Council
description: Enemies of Forest Council's rule **cannot** trade with or must from `symbol:suit-beast` cards.

name: Walled Garden
description: ± `symbol:diceb` per `symbol:suit-beast` at any sites if this site is targeted.

name: Vow of Beastkin
description: You **must** muster on a card that matching any of your advisers, but you gain one more warband.

name: Bracken
description: You may put all the cards you discard on the top or bottom of any one discard pile _(even your region's)_.

name: Wild Allies
description: **Action**: Campaign at any site with a `symbol:suit-beast` card. Act as if your pawn is there. Spend no Supply and add your warbands there to your force.

name: Sprawling Rampart
description: Each site ruled by Sprawling Rampart's ruler adds one more `symbol:diceb` when targeted.

name: Bandit Rampart
description: -2 `symbol:dicer` if this site is targeted.

name: Hall of Debate
description: Players **cannot** target the People's Favor

name: Hall of Mockery
description: Recovering the People's Favor always flips it to the Mob side.

name: Forest Temple
description: In the Chronicle, do not discard sites with any `symbol:suit-beast` cards.

name: Ruined Temple
description: Enemies of Ruined Temple's ruler **cannot** play `symbol:suit-beast` cards faceup.

name: Festival District
description: **Action**: Negotiate a binding exchange of `symbol:favor`, `symbol:secret`, and advisers with any player.

name: Squalid District
description: Whenever the `symbol:dicer` is rolled to end the game, Squalid District's ruler may increase or decrease this roll by one. Citizens **cannot** use this power.

name: Great Spire
description: You may swap any number of denizens you draw with random cards from the Dispossessed.

name: Fallen Spire
description: **Action**: Swap up to five denizens from the top of your region's discard pile _(skipping Visions)_ with random cards from the Dispossessed.

name: Ancient Forge
description: **Action**: Draw a relic. Take it or put it on the bottom of the relic deck.

name: Broken Forge
description: **Action**: Flip this card over.

name: Sticky Fire
description: If you're victorious, you may kill all the warbands in your enemy's force. If you do, you **must** give them `symbol:favor` if able.

name: Cursed Cauldron
description: If you're victorious, gain one warband per enemy warband killed in this campaign.

name: Brass Horse
description: **Action**: Reveal the top card of your discard pile. Travel to a site with a card of this suit. If unable, travel as normal. In either case, spend no Supply.

name: Truthful Harp
description: You may choose to draw two more cards. If you do, you **must** reveal every card you draw and the card you keep.

name: Grand Mask
description: If you're an Exile, during your turn you rule cards except battle plans at Imperial sites, and Imperial players do not.

name: Horned Mask
description: **Action**: Swap one of your faceup advisers with a card at your site.

name: Cup of Plenty
description: Spend no Supply if you're trading with a card that matches any of your advisers.

name: Whistle
description: **Action**: Choose a pawn at another site. they **must** travel to your site if able, spending no Supply. If they do, give them the `symbol:secret` here.

name: Dowsing Sticks
description: Dowsing Sticks

name: Cracked Horn
description: You may put all the cards you discard on the bottom of the world deck.

name: Bandit Crown
description: Act as if bandits are your warbands except at sites ruled by enemies. _(You rule empty sites.)_ They **cannot** be killed, moved, or sacrificed.

name: Ring of Devotion
description: You **cannot** place warbands at sites. When mustering, you gain two more warbands.

name: Skeleton Key
description: **Action**: If the Chancellor rules your site, peek at any one relic in the Imperial Reliquary, and you may take it.

name: Oracular Pig
description: **Action**: Peek at the top three cards of the world deck.

name: Circlet of Command
description: Players **cannot** target or take your banners or your other relics. In campaigns, banishing your pawn and favor adds one more `symbol:diceb`.

name: Ivory Eye
description: **Action**: Peek at any facedown site, adviser, or relic at any site.

name: Map
description: **Action**: Put this relic on the bottom of the relic deck to gain 4 Supply.

name: Obsidian Cage
description: If you're victorious, move all unkilled warbands in your enemy's force to the Obsidian Cage. **Action**: Move any number of warbands from Obsidian Cage to any board of the same color.

name: Book of Records
description: You **must** gain `symbol:secret` instead of `symbol:favor` when you play to a site.

name: Dragonskin Drum
description: After traveling, gain one warband.

name: The Grand Scepter
description: You cannot use this if you took it on this turn. **Action**: Peek in the Imperial Reliquary. **Action**: Offer Citizenship to any Exile, or exile a Citizen except yourself.

name: Conspiracy
description: _If drawn from the world deck, increase Visions Drawn. **Anyone** can play his face up._ **When Played**: You may burn `symbol:secret` to take one relic or banner from a player whose pawn is at your site. If it's a banner, it burns `symbol:favor` `symbol:favor` / `symbol:secret` `symbol:secret`. To do so, you **must** have at least two advisers whose suits match any of their adviers. Return this card to the box.

name: Vision of Faith
description: _If drawn from the world deck, increase Visions Drawn. **Exiles** can play this face up on their Revealed Vision space._ **Wake**: You win if you hold the Darkest Secret and at least three visions have been drawn from the deck.

name: Vision of Rebellion
description: _If drawn from the world deck, increase Visions Drawn. **Exiles** can play this face up on their Revealed Vision space._ **Wake**: You win if you hold the People's Favor and at least three visions have been drawn from the deck.

name: Vision of Sanctuary
description: _If drawn from the world deck, increase Visions Drawn. **Exiles** can play this face up on their Revealed Vision space._ **Wake**: You win if you hold the most relics and banners, and at least three visions have been drawn from the deck.

name: Vision of Conquest
description: _If drawn from the world deck, increase Visions Drawn. **Exiles** can play this face up on their Revealed Vision space._ **Wake**: You win if you rule the most sites and at least three visions have been drawn from the deck.

name: Ancient City
description: If you play an `symbol:suit-order` card to this site, and you have not discarded an `symbol:suit-order` card here during this turn, you get 2 warbands.

name: Barren Coast
description: When traveling from here to a Coast site, the Travel cost is 1 Supply and you **ignore** the Narrow Pass tower.

name: Buried Giant
description: When traveling from here, you may flip one secret on your board facedown to spend no Supply and **ignore** the Narrow Pass power. _(Facedown secrets cannot be used to pay a cost.)_

name: Charming Valley
description: When traveling from here, increase the Travel cost by 1 Supply. _(For example, traveling from the Provinces costs 3 Supply, not 2 Supply.)_

name: Deep Woods
description: If you play a `symbol:suit-beast` card to this site, and you have not discarded a `symbol:suit-beast` card here during this turn, you take the relic here, treating this as recovering it.

name: Drowned City
description: At the end of your Wake Phase, if your pawn is here, you may take one `symbol:secret` from this site.

name: Fertile Valley
description: If you play a `suit:heart` card to this site, and you have not discarded a `symbol:suit-hearth` card here during this turn, you get `symbol:favor`.

name: Great Slum
description: When playing or moving a card to this site, you may discard a card here first.

name: The Tribunal
description: **Action**: If you rule this site or your pawn is here, negotiate a binding exchange of `symbol:favor` and `symbol:secret` as well as binding actions at any future time, in any combination, with any player. _(Be as creative as you want with your agreement and your agreed-upon penalties if someone breaks it!)_

name: Lush Coast
description: When traveling from here to a Coast site, the Travel cost is 1 Supply and you **ignore** the Narrow Pass power.

name: Marshes
description: When searching, you **must** draw one fewer card if your pawn is here.

name: Mine
description: At the end of your Wake Phase, if your pawn is here, you may take one `symbol:favor` from this site.

name: Mountain
description: You **must** subtract one `symbol:dicer` if you declare any number of targets at this site _(even if you rule)_.

name: Narrow Pass
description: When traveling from another region to this region, you **must** Travel to this site. When campaigning, if you declare any targets in this region and your pawn is in a different region, you **must** target this site unless you rule it.

name: Plains
description: You **must** add one `symbol:dicer` if you declare any number of targets at this site _(even if you rule)_.

name: River
description: When mustering from a card at this site, you gain one more warband if you rule this site.

name: Rocky Coast
description: Rocky Coast

name: Salt Flats
description: At the end of your Wake Phase, if your pawn is here, you may take one `symbol:favor` or `symbol:secret` from this site.

name: Shrouded Wood
description: When traveling from here, the Travel cost is 2 Supply, and you **ignore** the Narrow Pass and The Hidden Place powers. If an enemy rules here, you travel to the site of the ruler's choice _(Chancellor's choice if ruled by the Empire)_, even if another player is making you travel.

name: Standing Stones
description: If you play an `symbol:suit-arcane` card to this site, and you have not discarded an `symbol:suit-arcane` card here during this turn, you get `symbol:secret`.

name: Steppe
description: If you play a `symbol:suit-nomad` card to this site, and you have not discarded a `symbol:suit-nomad` card here during this turn, you get `symbol:secret`.

name: The Hidden Place
description: You **cannot** travel to here or declare campaign targets here unless you flip one secret on your board facedown.

name: Wastes
description: If you play a `symbol:suit-discord` card to this site, and you have not discarded a `symbol:suit-discord` card here during this turn, you get take the relic here, treating this as recovering it.

name: Banner of the Darkest Secret
description: **Recovery**: Players can only recover this from you if there is a card at your site whose suit does not match any of your advisers. _(You can recover it from yourself or the shared bank freely.)_ The new holder must place more `symbol:secret` than old `symbol:secret` here, then takes one `symbol:secret` from the old `symbol:secret` here, and the old holder takes the rest. **Search**: Spend 2 Supply if you're drawing from the world deck _(not the printed cost)_.

name: Banner of the Mob's Favor
description: **Recovery**: Put more `symbol:favor` here than old `symbol:favor`. Put old `symbol:favor` in the favor banks, one by one, starting with any suit. Then, flip this banner. **Wake**: You **must** put `symbol:favor` here or move `symbol:favor` here to the favor bank with the least `symbol:favor`. Do this twice. **Search**: When playing to site, you may first discard a denizen card at any site in your region, and you may play to any site in your region.

name: Banner of the People's Favor
description: **Recovery**: Put more `symbol:favor` here than old `symbol:favor`. Put old `symbol:favor` in the favor banks, one by one, starting with any suit. **Wake**: You **must** put `symbol:favor` here or move `symbol:favor` here to the favor bank with the least `symbol:favor`. Then, if this banner has 6+ `symbol:favor`, flip it. **Search**: When playing to site, you may first discard a denizen card at any site in your region, and you may play to any site in your region.

name: Oathkeeper of Devotion
description: Oathkeeper of Devotion holds the Darkest Secret. Successor to the Chancellor holds the Grand Scepter.

name: Oathkeeper of Protection
description: Oathkeeper of Protection holds the most relics and banners. Successor to the Chancellor holds the People's Favor.

name: Oathkeeper of Supremacy
description: Oathkeeper of Supremacy rules the most sites. Successor to the Chancellor holds more relics and banners.

name: Oathkeeper of the People
description: Oathkeeper of the People holds the People's Favor. Successor to the Chancellor holds the Darkest Secret.

name: Brutal
description: If you're the attacker, the defeated player _(even you)_ **must** kill all warbands in their force.

name: Careless
description: You gain one more `symbol:favor` _(even when trading for `symbol:secret`)_. You **must** gain one less `symbol:secret` when trading for `symbol:secret`.

name: Decadent
description: Spend no Supply if you're traveling to a site in the Cradle from a site in the Provinces or Hinterland. If you're traveling to a site in the Hinterland, increase the Travel cost by 1 Supply.

name: Greedy
description: Draw two more cards. _(Stop after a Vision as normal.)_ You **cannot** search if you would spend more than 2 Supply.
